lines.translation: Fragrant green grass stretches to the horizon

lines.pinyin: wan feng fu liu di sheng can
lines.translation: The evening breeze brushes willows, as the flute’s sound fades
Beyond the mountains, the setting sun sinks
At the edge of the sky
At the corner of the earth
Half of my dear friends have drifted apart

lines.pinyin: yi hu zhuo jiu jin yu huan
lines.translation: A pot of humble wine drains what little joy remains

lines.hanzi: 情千缕 酒一杯 声声喋喋催
lines.pinyin: qing qian lü jiu yi bei sheng sheng die die cui
lines.translation: A thousand threads of feeling, a cup of wine, words urging again and again

lines.pinyin: wen jun ci qu ji shi huan
lines.translation: I ask you, when will you return from this journey?
When you return, do not linger
